title: Settings Registration and Retrieval
key_actors: Tab classes (UsageTab, AccountTab, SecurityTab, PersonalizationTab, LanguageTag, KeyboardShortcutsTab, AboutTab)

data_structures.SettingsService#tabs: private array of registered tab descriptor objects
data_structures.tab_descriptor: { ...metadata, reinitialize(), get dom() } — plain object pushed to #tabs
data_structures.tab_descriptor_from_ui_element: built by spreading ui_element.as(TSettingsTab).get_metadata(), plus reinitialize() and dom getter

activity_flow: [START] GUI bootstrap (initgui.js) calls: register('settings', new SettingsService())
Service.init() is called → delegates to SettingsService._init()
_init(): define built-in tab array: [UsageTab, AccountTab, SecurityTab, PersonalizationTab, LanguageTag, KeyboardShortcutsTab, AboutTab]
forEach tab in built-in array → call this.register_tab(tab)
[DECISION] Is tab an instance of UIElement?
Build wrapper: { ...metadata, reinitialize(){ ui_element.reinitialize() }, get dom(){ return ui_element.root } }
[NO branch]  Use tab as-is (plain tab class/object)
[LOOP] Repeat for each tab in array
[END OF REGISTRATION] All 7 built-in tabs are in #tabs
External caller may call SettingsService.register_tab(tab) at any time (same logic applies)
UIWindowSettings iterates returned tabs array to render tab placeholders and UI
key_conditions: tab instanceof UIElement → wrap via TSettingsTab trait adapter before registering
tab is a plain object/class → push directly to #tabs

method_signatures._init: async _init() — no params; registers 7 built-in tabs
method_signatures.register_tab: register_tab(tab) — accepts UIElement or plain tab object; normalises and pushes to #tabs
method_signatures.get_tabs: get_tabs() — returns #tabs array (all registered tab descriptors)

key_relationships: SettingsService imports: UsageTab, AccountTab, SecurityTab, PersonalizationTab, LanguageTag, KeyboardShortcutsTab, AboutTab, UIElement
SettingsService uses TSettingsTab trait (loaded via use('ui.traits.TSettingsTab'), defined by UIWindowSettings as a Symbol)
initgui.js instantiates and registers SettingsService under key 'settings'
important_notes: TSettingsTab is a Symbol-based trait key defined with def() in UIWindowSettings.js and retrieved with use(). The UIElement branch of register_tab adapts a UIElement into a plain tab descriptor by extracting metadata and wrapping reinitialize/dom. All 7 built-in tabs are registered synchronously inside _init via forEach. The #tabs array is private (JS private field). External services can register additional tabs by calling register_tab() directly.
